title: Self-Healing Battery Separator
abstract: A battery separator membrane incorporating microcapsules filled with a polymer precursor that ruptures upon mechanical damage, releasing the precursor to seal punctures and prevent internal short circuits. The microcapsules are distributed within a polyethylene matrix and sized to match common dendrite penetration dimensions.
claims: 1. A battery separator comprising a porous polymer membrane with embedded microcapsules containing a self-polymerizing agent.

title: Adaptive Charging Protocol Using Impedance Spectroscopy
abstract: An adaptive fast-charging system that continuously monitors battery impedance during charging using electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) and adjusts charging current in real-time to maintain optimal lithium plating conditions. The system uses a neural network trained on impedance signatures to predict the onset of lithium plating before it occurs.
claims: 1. A charging system comprising an EIS measurement circuit integrated with a charge controller and trained neural network for real-time charging optimization.

title: Recyclable Wind Turbine Blade Using Thermoplastic Composites
abstract: A wind turbine blade constructed from thermoplastic composite materials that can be fully recycled at end-of-life by remelting. The blade uses a segmented design with thermoplastic resin infusion and welded joints that maintain structural integrity during operation but can be separated by controlled heating for recycling.
claims: 1. A wind turbine blade comprising thermoplastic composite segments joined by thermoplastic welding.
